hero.title: Web development without the circus.
hero.subtitle: We're not a 50-person agency. We're two devs who get things done. We launch landings and e-commerce that sell. No bullshit. No endless meetings.

cta.subtitle: You're just one click away from transforming your digital vision into reality. Let's work together to create web solutions that boost your business.

process.description: Six structured stages that guarantee exceptional results in every web development project.

analysis.title: Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Research and strategy
analysis.description: We start by deeply understanding your business, goals, and audience. We analyze your competition, define the project scope, and establish a clear digital strategy that maximizes return on investment.

structure.title: Structure
structure.subtitle: Wireframes and flows
structure.description: We design the information architecture and navigation flows. We create wireframes that optimize user experience and facilitate conversion, establishing solid foundations for development.

design.title: Design
design.subtitle: Visual identity
design.description: We create a visual identity that reflects your brand's personality and connects with your audience. Every element is strategically designed to build trust and maximize conversions.

code.title: Code
code.subtitle: Technical implementation
code.description: We transform designs into clean, scalable, and optimized code. We implement advanced features, necessary integrations, and ensure your site loads fast and works perfectly.

testing.title: Testing
testing.subtitle: Quality control
testing.description: We perform exhaustive testing on all devices and browsers. We verify speed, functionality, and user experience to ensure everything works perfectly before launch.

deploy.title: Deploy
deploy.subtitle: Go live
deploy.description: We launch your website to the world. We configure analytics, implement SEO strategies, and train you to manage content. We include ongoing support to ensure long-term success.

services.title: Web development services
services.subtitle: that transform ideas into reality
services.description: From corporate websites to complex web applications, we create digital solutions that drive your business growth.

ecommerce.label: E-COMMERCE
ecommerce.title: Your online store ready to operate
ecommerce.description: We set up your catalog, configure checkout and integrate payments and shipping. Everything prepared so you can sell without depending on third parties.

webapps.label: WEB APPLICATIONS
webapps.title: From idea to functional product
webapps.description: Dashboards, platforms and custom tools. If you have something more complex in mind than a website, we build that too.

redesign.label: REDESIGN
redesign.title: We update your existing site
redesign.description: If your website looks outdated or underperforms, we renew it with modern technology. Better performance, better experience and search engine optimized structure.

support.label: SUPPORT
support.title: Your site always working
support.description: Maintenance, updates and continuous monitoring. We take care of keeping your website online without interruptions.

services.cta: We constantly expand our services to adapt to our clients' needs. If you have something in mind that's not listed,

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We build digital experiences that last
about.description: tangodev is born from the passion for creating web solutions that truly impact. We are a team of developers with experience in modern technologies and agile methodologies.
about.description2: We combine minimalist design with clean code to deliver scalable digital products, from landing pages to complex web applications.

pricing.title: Investment for your project
pricing.subtitle: Reference ranges so you have an idea of the budget. Each project receives a custom quote based on scope, complexity and specific timeline. First consultation free of charge.
pricing.customEnd: and I'll prepare a custom quote for you.

landing.name: Landing Page / Simple Website
features: 100% custom design tailored to your brand
Technology of choice: Next.js, WordPress, Framer, Webflow or HTML/CSS
100% responsive and optimized (Lighthouse 90+)
Functional forms + integrations (EmailJS, Resend, etc.)
Complete technical on-page SEO
Deploy included on your preferred platform
30 days of post-delivery technical support

ecommerce.name: E-commerce / Online Store
features: Unlimited product catalog with filters and search
Optimized checkout with Mercado Pago, Stripe or bank transfers
Admin panel to manage products and orders
Automated coupons, discounts and promotions system
Real-time sales reports and statistics
Conversion optimization (CRO) and mobile-first
Personalized training to manage your store

saas.name: Web Application / SaaS
features: Scalable architecture with robust backend (Supabase/PostgreSQL)
Secure authentication (magic links, OAuth, 2FA)
Advanced dashboard with user roles and permissions
Recurring payments integration (Stripe/Mercado Pago)
REST API or GraphQL with documentation
Webhooks and third-party service integrations
Priority support and 3 months maintenance included

contact.title: Let's start your project
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your idea and we'll get in touch within the next 24 hours.
